content.en:
At this time, almost none of the gods would be willing to give up the game.

It can even be said that almost every game in the final round is a life-and-death battle.

Although everyone will have to fight against 99 other opponents, the first place in each group will definitely not fight at the beginning, and will definitely fight at the end.

In this case, the first place in each group has an absolute advantage, and the hope of winning a place is very high.

If the first team in each group plays in advance, it will even cause the gods who had hoped to get the quota to be hit hard and even fall in advance.

Because of this, the group winners will not meet in advance, which is also one of the treatments of the group leaders.

No one has an opinion on this approach, after all, others have worked hard to get the first place in the group, if there is no good treatment, it is abnormal!

Soon, the final round was played.

A famous god will all take the field and start their first game.

Xiao Yue's opponent was not strong, ranking at the bottom of the hundred god generals, but the other party did not have the slightest intention of admitting defeat, but went all out as soon as he got on the field, and used treasure weapons to try to break the gap in strength.

However, all in vain.

Although Xiao Yue did not burst out with all her strength, she easily won the first game just by relying on the strength of the peak of the Nine Stars and one or two Chaos Divine Powers.

For the rest of the day, one game after another went.

Most of the battles were expected, but there were a few gods who rose like dark horses, and they were completely different from the previous games.

One is the reincarnation god general of the Forbidden Temple, the other is the desolate god general of Dao Mountain, and the other is the ice and rain god general of the giant axe city.

These three gods only had the second or third record in the previous group stage, but now they all showed terrible strength, and even easily killed the second and third strongest players in other groups, and almost did not show their full strength.

This kind of strength is even more terrifying than the first seed players of the previous transcendent forces, it can be seen that these people are hiding their strength, and they are the real hole cards of the major transcendent forces and secretly cultivating geniuses.

Especially the reincarnation god general, who is proficient in divine soul attacks, can wipe out other divine generals without sound, and several divine generals who fought with him have been severely injured in their souls, and even one of them died directly.

And the power of the Desolate God General is very terrifying, and it is a rare strength-type special physique-Barbarian God Body!

This kind of physique is enough to make a person's strength reach a terrifying level, and with a powerful alchemy technique in Shangdao Mountain-Barbarian Alchemy, this makes the Desolate Divine General have a power far beyond that of other divine generals, and with the power-type chaos divine power and various treasures, it is enough to exert terrifying power, and can even break ten thousand spells with one punch.

And the strength of the Ice Rain God General lies in her supernatural powers, she has mastered a powerful and even ice-free domain from the Divine Heaven Realm!

This supernatural power is extremely powerful, and combined with her Ice and Snow Holy Body, it can increase the power of the supernatural power, so her Ice-Free Domain is at least twice as powerful as the Ice-Free Domain that others have cultivated.

The gods who fought against the Ice Rain God General were frozen one after another, and they couldn't break the ice state at all, although they didn't die, they lost the game.

But the most terrifying of the three is the reincarnation general, and the other gods would rather meet the desolate universe god general and the ice rain god general than the reincarnation god general, because if you fight with the reincarnation god general, you will either be hit hard or fall, which is simply too dangerous.

In addition to these three dark horses, the first of the ten little ancestors is not weak.

As everyone fought for one or twenty games, the progress of the later games was much faster, because many god generals who were injured in battle, once they met stronger god generals, were not willing to fight again, but chose to admit defeat and prepare for the later battles.

And Xiao Yue's strength is enough to rank in the top ten, so many gods will directly admit defeat when they encounter Xiao Yue, which makes Xiao Yue reduce the possibility of exposing his strength.

But with the passage of time, the strong and the strong will eventually clash.

Soon, Xiao Yue ushered in one of her powerful opponents, the first place in the sixth group - Luo Yu Divine General.

Luo Yu Divine General is also a nine-star peak divine general, and he is the divine general of the God of War Tower, and he is the personal disciple of a Dao Ancestor of the God of War Tower, and his status is second only to the original Yunzi Divine Maiden.

The reason why it is said that the status is second only to the Yunzi Divine Maiden is because Luo Yu Divine General's master is not as good as that of the Yunzi Divine Maiden, otherwise Luo Yu Shenzun will not be inferior to the Yunzi Divine Maiden.

But in terms of strength, Luo Yu Divine General is probably even stronger than Yun Zi Divine Maiden, because Luo Yu Divine General's combat talent is too terrifying, as if he was born to fight.

He didn't have any powerful hole cards, but his will to fight was too terrifying, and his use of various secret techniques far surpassed that of other gods, as if he had been fighting for countless years.

In terms of combat talent and skills, Xiao Yue is indeed inferior to the other party.

can talk about strength, but no one is optimistic about Luo Yu Shenjiang, because Luo Yu Shenjiang does not have many hole cards.

Of course, all speculation is in vain until the actual battle is made.

Soon, the battle between the two began.

At the beginning of the battle, Xiao Yue crushed Luo Yu Divine General, but Luo Yu Divine General's combat talent was too high, and he actually blocked Xiao Yue's attack for a while.

But with Xiao Yue's Sect Chaos Divine Power attack, the victorious scales began to favor Xiao Yue.

"Steady!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Not to mention that Luo Yu Divine General is only a nine-star peak divine general, even if the other party has the combat power of a ten-star divine general, Ye Tian is also very confident in his wife's strength.

The two sides are not a grade of gods at all!

The foundation of Giant Axe City is not as good as the four transcendent forces, so Luo Yu Shenjiang's hole cards are not powerful, there is only one big killing weapon, and he can't help Xiao Yue at all.

Therefore, in the end, Luo Yu God will lose, and he will admit defeat.

He didn't even dare to continue fighting, for fear that the injury would be too serious, the hole cards would consume the price, and he would not be able to beat others later.

Anyway, there are ten places, and if you only lose a few games, you can still get one.

Day by day, the strength of the 100 god generals was almost revealed at this time, but the number of fallen god generals reached ten, which shows how tragic the battle was.

And the best of these gods undoubtedly belong to the reincarnation gods, ice and rain gods, and desolate universe gods, plus Xiao Yue, cold-blooded gods, cloudless gods, Hongyin gods, and Baohu gods.

As for Luo Yu Divine Generals, these gods who were originally the first in the group were defeated again and again, and they were completely one notch behind the top ones.

But until the last minute, no one knew who the ten places belonged to.
